name: The great wasteland of Midgaard
description:
This once was wide dirt path through the lush, green, fresh Midgaard countryside.
Now, The dead city of Midgaard lies to the south. You can only see 
undead bodies and desert wastelands now.

Undead Midgaard, made in Brazil by :

Luigi : Codes, mobs, rooms, zone info, history and overall strategy.
Tyr : Most mobs and mobs setup.
Entity : Some mobs and introduction quest.
Taerom : Idea.

exits.description: You see the path which goes back to Midgaard.
